title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (14), PAGE 157, PARAGRAPH FOUR, SECTION ONE-a OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2979 / 57 OG No. 6, 1011 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2780, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (14), PAGE 157, PARAGRAPH FOUR, SECTION ONE-a OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (14), page 157, paragraph four, Section One-a of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(14) New municipal building, Tanauan, Batangasâ

Construction and/or improvement P20,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
